_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement)

title: Commcercial Engineering Design Data and Associated Lists
summary: This Data Item Description defines the format and content preparation instructions for Commercial Engineering Design Data and Associated Lists, essential for acquiring military systems and evaluating engineering documentation.
use_relationship:
Commercial Engineering Design Data and Associated Lists define commercial items acquired by the Department of Defense.
a. This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format and content preparation instructions for Commercial Engineering Design Data and Associated Lists resulting from the work task described in 5.4.1.4 of MIL-STD-31000.
b. This DID is applicable to acquisitions of military systems, equipment, and components. Its use is limited by the requirements of the Defense Federal Acquisition Regulation Supplement (DFARS), Subpart 227. Before acquiring Commercial Engineering Design Data and Associated Lists, the acquiring activity should evaluate the contractor's engineering design data package and engineering documentation practices to determine if the data will be satisfactory for the Government's intended uses.
c. This DID should be tailored to the minimum data requirements of the applicable contract or purchase order.
d. This DID is related to DI-SESS-81000F, DI-SESS-81001F, and DI- SESS-81002F. This DID supersedes DI-SESS-81003E.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: General.
preparation_instructions.content: Commercial Engineering Design Data and Associated Lists shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-31000 and the TDP Option Selection Worksheet incorporated into the contract or purchase order.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: Engineering Design Data and associated lists shall be in the contractor's or original supplier's format.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: Commercial Engineering Design Data and Associated Lists shall provide sufficient information to permit Government maintenance, modification, and engineering analysis of commercial items.

_source.source_file: DI-SESS-81003F Commercial Engineering Design Data and Associated Lists.pdf
